channel.title: Home on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Systology

item.title: Service Resilience
item.description: Design patterns for reliable microservice behavior under load; implementing strict request idempotency, non-blocking async I/O, robust circuit breakers, durable background queues, and observability.

item.title: Model Serving & Inference
item.description: Principles for highly available production ML inference; utilizing immutable model registries, dynamic request micro-batching, safe canary rollouts, graceful fallback degradation, and efficient GPU memory management.

item.title: Distributed Web Crawler
item.description: Design for a Google-scale web crawler focusing on Breadth-First Search (BFS), DNS resolution caching, robots.txt politeness, and handling duplicate or malicious domains.

item.title: URL Shortener & Pastebin
item.description: Design for a highly available, read-heavy service bridging short aliases to long URLs, focusing on Base62 encoding, Snowflake IDs, and collision avoidance.

item.title: Real-Time Collaborative WebApp
item.description: Design for a Google Docs or Figma style application using WebSockets, Operational Transformation (OT), or CRDTs to maintain consistent state among concurrent writers.

item.title: Video Transcoding & Streaming Pipeline
item.description: Design for a scalable video ingestion and transcoding system that chunks media, extracts features, and outputs adaptive bitrates using worker pools.

item.title: SQL vs. NoSQL
item.description: A decision-making framework for choosing between SQL (relational, strict ACID) and NoSQL (distributed, flexible schemas) databases, evaluating data structures, horizontal scalability needs, and tunable consistency requirements.

item.title: Intervals & Constraints
item.description: A framework for balancing Latency (system Completeness) against Verification (data Integrity) by effectively choosing between Speculative execution and Pessimistic consensus intervals.

item.title: Ad Click Aggregator
item.description: Design for aggregating ad clicks at massive scale, focusing on deduplication, exactly-once processing, and low-latency reporting.

item.title: Flash Sale / Ticketmaster
item.description: Design for handling extreme bursts of traffic where limited inventory must be distributed fairly and consistently under heavy load.

item.title: Notification System
item.description: Design of a high-throughput notification service supporting push, email, and SMS with prioritization, rate limiting, and delivery tracking.

item.title: Payment System
item.description: Design of a scalable payment gateway integration and internal ledger system ensuring idempotency, strict consistency, and failure recovery.

item.title: Proximity Service for Maps
item.description: Design for finding nearby points of interest with low latency, focusing on geospatial data structures like Geohashing or Quadtrees.

item.title: Distributed Caching Layer for VCS
item.description: Design a distributed cache to reduce I/O and speed up VCS operations by caching objects and hashes with high concurrency and low latency.

item.title: End-to-End Migration & Deduplication
item.description: System design for migrating large datasets with deduplication, integrity checks, resumability, and idempotence.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: CDN-backed media delivery architecture for low-latency, highly-available global media serving with background upload processing.

item.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Platform
item.description: Platform design for federated learning that trains across devices without sharing raw data, with secure aggregation and privacy safeguards.

item.title: Real-Time Analytics Pipeline
item.description: Scalable real-time pipeline to ingest and process high-volume user event streams for immediate analytics and dashboards; handles late arrivals and fault tolerance.

item.title: Search & Retrieval Engine
item.description: Design a high-performance search and retrieval engine for large document/media collections with low-latency ranking and scalable indexing.

item.title: AI/ML Workshop
item.description: A carefully curated set of practical, highly reproducible machine learning examples (PyTorch, Hugging Face, NumPy) featuring MPS-aware benchmarks and rigorous experiment hygiene for local hardware.

item.title: Algorithms & Performance
item.description: Principles for clear algorithms and effective performance engineering; utilizing strict micro-benchmarking, careful memory allocation discipline, avoiding cache misses, and deterministic random generators.

item.title: Chowist
item.description: A decade-spanning food discovery app migrated from Ruby Sinatra to Rails to Django. Lessons on incremental framework migrations and sustaining a single codebase through ecosystem shifts.

item.title: Compiler Design
item.description: Guidelines for robust compiler design and implementation; covering clear Intermediate Representation (IR) boundaries, enforcing deterministic semantics, generating actionable error reports, and optimizing for incremental compilation.

item.title: Data Pipelines
item.description: Architectural principles for reliable batch and streaming data pipelines; focusing on strict time semantics, exactly-once processing, optimal partitioning, observability, and reproducible states.

item.title: Extensibility & Plugin Architecture
item.description: Architectural guidelines for highly modular systems; covering secure plugin architectures, maintaining stable API contracts, managing cross-language FFI bindings, and defining safe extension points.

item.title: Grit
item.description: A from‑scratch, educational Git implementation built entirely in Rust; deeply focusing on object storage mechanics, runtime performance, and full programmatic plumbing/porcelain compatibility.

item.title: Mailprune
item.description: A highly effective, local-first email auditing and automated cleanup tool designed to definitively identify noisy senders and deliver actionable, strictly privacy-preserving recommendations.

item.title: Media Analysis
item.description: Best practices for resilient media feature extraction pipelines; ensuring stable representation schemas, choosing between streaming and batch modes, enforcing metadata preservation, and performance engineering.

item.title: Migration & Deduplication
item.description: Strategic practices for safe, idempotent, and efficient large-scale data migrations; incorporating reliable deduplication heuristics, checksum-based integrity validation, and seamless fallbacks.

item.title: ML Experiments
item.description: Guidance for reproducible, resource-aware machine learning experiments; leveraging lightweight MLOps primitives, strict environment versioning, seed management, and rigorous, deterministic model evaluation protocols.

item.title: Monitoring & Observability
item.description: Best practices for establishing robust observability using RED/USE metrics, contextual structured logging, distributed tracing, actionable alerting, and SLO-driven reliability engineering.

item.title: Networking & Services
item.description: Operational guidance for resilient networked services; detailing robust API contracts, exponential retries with jitter, sliding-window rate limiting, strict timeout budgets, connection pooling, and mutual TLS.

item.title: Photohaul
item.description: A robust Java-based tool engineered for seamlessly organizing and migrating extensive photo collections; featuring rigorous deduplication, automatic metadata preservation, and resumable execution.

item.title: Privacy & Agents
item.description: Privacy-first design rules for autonomous AI agents; establishing local-first execution defaults, strict data minimization and redaction, explicit user consent flows, and transparent, auditable action logs.

item.title: Ragchain
item.description: A comprehensive local RAG stack (ChromaDB + Ollama) designed for strictly private, reproducible retrieval and LLM inference; heavily focusing on hybrid retrieval strategies and index versioning.

item.title: Retrieval & RAG
item.description: Operational principles for robust search retrieval and RAG pipelines; focusing on hybrid lexical-semantic retrieval techniques, long-term embedding model stability, automated ranking evaluation, and privacy-aware indexing.

item.title: Rustoku
item.description: A highly optimized Sudoku solver and generator engineered in Rust using advanced bitmasking and MRV heuristics; emphasizing speed, determinism, and clear, explainable solve traces.

item.title: Spark Trial
item.description: An intensive end-to-end ETL processing example leveraging Apache Spark for large-scale parquet datasets; deeply focusing on strict schema handling, optimal partitioning, and reproducible aggregations.

item.title: Streaming Frameworks
item.description: A deep architectural comparison of streaming pipelines: evaluating Apache Beam’s portable unified model (Java/DirectRunner) against Apache Flink’s native API for stateful processing and fault tolerance.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: An exploration of multimodal video feature extraction comparing Apple-native frameworks (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) against cross-platform C++/Python toolchains (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML prep.

item.title: VirtuC
item.description: A from-scratch, Rust-implemented compiler designed for a targeted C subset that effectively emits standard LLVM IR; heavily focusing on proper AST design, semantic checking, and IR verification.

item.title: Web App
item.description: Guiding principles for production-ready web apps using 12-factor methodologies; encompassing stateless scaling, durable media handling, robust background processing, CI/CD, and deep observability.
